author.bio: Software Tester, Mentor, Blogger, Photographer, Gamer, Fantasy lover, Novelist wanna-be... I'm probably forgetting something else.
author.name: Diogo Nunes

content.text: We want #Slack to be translated, because no one should be forced to know English to collaborate. Vote at https://www.change.org/p/slack-technologies-inc-slack-to-implement-i18n-until-the-end-of-2017?recruiter=749748157&utm_source=share_petition&utm_medium=twitter&utm_campaign=share_twitter_responsive
